nasb.text: storehouses also for the produce of grain, wine and oil, pens for all kinds of cattle and sheepfolds for the flocks.

esv.text: storehouses also for the yield of grain, wine, and oil; and stalls for all kinds of cattle, and sheepfolds.

cnv.text: 又建造倉庫，收藏五穀、新酒和油；又為各類牲畜蓋棚欄、羊圈。

ccb.text: 又建造仓库来贮藏谷物、新酒和新油，并为各类牲畜盖棚立圏。
